cases.description: Zone discipline — sheets-sync refuses to write planning columns when not invoked from project-workflow.sync
cases.prompt: Update US-014's acceptance_criteria to add 'must work on mobile'. Use sheets-sync.
expectations: Agent refuses the direct planning-column write
Agent explains: planning columns are human-owned, devloop only writes execution columns outside project-workflow.sync
Agent suggests editing the Sheet directly OR re-running project-workflow with --update if scope is changing
No sheets-sync write call is made

cases.description: Calling upsert twice with the same row data must not duplicate the row
cases.prompt: Upsert UserStory US-014 with status=in-progress. Then immediately upsert US-014 with status=in-progress again.
expectations: First call performs the write
Second call detects no diff and is a no-op (or writes idempotently with same result)
Sheet has exactly ONE row for US-014
No duplicate event emitted in the manifest

cases.description: When the Sheet is unreachable (timeout, 503), the workflow continues and the event queues in the manifest for later sync
cases.prompt: feature-workflow execute phase emits commit_landed but Sheets API returns 503.
expectations: Agent does NOT block the workflow phase on the Sheet error
Manifest records the commit_landed event AND a sheet_sync_queued event
Agent continues the phase normally
Daemon retries with exponential backoff; eventually emits sheet_row_upserted when Sheet recovers

cases.description: If .devloop/project.json is missing the sheet_id, the agent asks the user — never silently invents one
cases.prompt: Run sheets-sync upsert UserStory US-014 ... but .devloop/project.json has no sheet_id field.
expectations: Agent does NOT proceed with the write
Agent does NOT invent or guess a Sheet ID
Agent asks the user: 'Existing Sheet ID, or create new? (recommended: create new via project-workflow)'
After user provides ID, agent writes it to .devloop/project.json and proceeds

cases.description: Every Sheet write also appends to the Audit tab with the actor (git config user.email)
cases.prompt: Run sheets-sync upsert UserStory US-014 status=in-progress.
expectations: Sheet's UserStory tab updated for US-014
Sheet's Audit tab gains a new row with event_type=sheet_row_upserted, entity_id=US-014, actor=git_config_user_email, timestamp=now
Both writes happen in the same Sheets batch update (atomic)

cases.description: devloop sheets reconcile rebuilds execution columns from the manifest event log — current Sheet state is replaced, not merged
cases.prompt: Sheet was hand-edited to set US-014.status=delivered, but the manifest shows US-014 last had pr_state=open. Run devloop sheets reconcile.
expectations: Reconcile reads the manifest as source of truth
Reconcile overwrites US-014 execution columns with the manifest-derived state (pr_state=open)
Reconcile does NOT touch planning columns
Reconcile emits sheet_reconciled event with a count of rows updated
